text:
On Mon, Oct 13, 2008 at 4:07 AM, Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi Carlos,
>
> just a quick note: you probably meant to increment PORTREVISION in the
> Makefile, not PORTEPOCH.
>
> Regards,
> Stefan

Yes, that was the intention. Thanks for spotting it.

-- 
cd /usr/ports/sysutils/life
make clean
